title: How a godly man leads when it costs him
caption:
Real leadership isn't a title. It's a move.

The Cross wasn't management — it was the first one into the cost. That's the template. First to apologize. First to serve. First to take the hit. Not "I'm in charge, do what I say" — but "I'll go first, follow me."

The hardest one is the Tuesday no one sees. The decision with no witnesses. What you are in private is what you actually are. You can't manufacture in public what you never built alone.

Save this for the week you have to lead without wanting to.

#faith #christianmen #godlymen #manofgod #leadership #discipleship #masculinity #scripture #servantleadership
theme: He leads by going first into the cost.
